# zstack_vpc_shared_qos (Resource)

Manages VPC Shared QoS resources in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `l3_network_uuid` (String) The UUID of the L3 network.
- `name` (String) The name of the VPC Shared QoS.
- `vpc_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC.

### Optional

- `bandwidth` (Number) The bandwidth limit in bits per second.
- `description` (String) The description of the VPC Shared QoS.

### Read-Only

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VPC Shared QoS.
